business.name: Workflow Partners
business.pageTitle: Workflow Partners — Automation for Growing Businesses
business.metaDescription: Automation consulting for small and mid-size businesses. We audit your workflows, build custom automations, and keep them running.

hero.tagline: Stop doing work a machine should do
hero.subtitle: We help small and mid-size businesses eliminate repetitive tasks, connect their tools, and build automations that actually stick.
hero.ctaSubtext: No commitment. We'll show you what's possible.

problemStatement.heading: Sound familiar?
problemStatement.subheading: Most growing businesses hit the same walls once manual processes can't keep up.

painPoints.title: Manual data entry everywhere
painPoints.description: Your team copies information between tools, reformats spreadsheets, and double-checks records that should update themselves.

painPoints.title: Disconnected tools
painPoints.description: Your CRM doesn't talk to your invoicing. Your forms don't feed your project tracker. Nothing is wired together.

painPoints.title: Things falling through cracks
painPoints.description: Follow-ups get missed, onboarding steps get skipped, and important notifications never reach the right person.

services.heading: What we automate
services.subheading: Six areas where most small businesses lose the most time.

items.title: Client & Lead Management
items.description: Capture leads, onboard new clients, and nurture prospects without manual follow-up.

items.title: Billing & Financial Ops
items.description: Automate invoicing, payment tracking, and financial data sync across your tools.

items.title: Documents & Data Collection
items.description: Collect, organize, and extract data from documents and forms automatically.

items.title: Reporting & Analytics
items.description: Consolidate data from multiple tools into dashboards and automated reports.

items.title: Internal Ops & Productivity
items.description: Keep your team organized with automated task creation, notifications, and provisioning.

items.title: Inventory & Supply Chain
items.description: Sync inventory levels, track purchase orders, and get alerts before stock runs out.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subheading: A straightforward process designed to deliver value quickly.

steps.title: Audit
steps.description: We map your current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and find the highest-impact automations — then present a clear plan with expected ROI.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We design and implement your automations using the right tools for the job — n8n, Make, Zapier, or custom code — tested and documented.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: We monitor, maintain, and iterate on your automations so they keep working as your business evolves. No set-it-and-forget-it.

security.heading: Your data stays yours
security.subheading: Every engagement includes a data security review. We audit access, enforce permissions, and make sure your data is secure.

about.heading: Who we are
about.subheading: A small team that's done this at scale — now helping growing businesses get the same leverage.

team.name: Bob Colner
team.bio: 10-year Silicon Valley veteran specializing in data science, data engineering, and business analytics. Bob designs and builds the automation systems that make everything run.

team.name: Ben Charney
team.bio: Deep background in sales and business operations. Ben works directly with clients to understand their workflows, identify high-impact opportunities, and keep projects on track.

contact.heading: Let's talk about what you can automate
contact.subheading: Tell us a bit about your business and we'll come back with ideas.
contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.privacyNote: We'll only use your info to follow up on your inquiry. No spam, ever.
